basic_details.job_title: STPI Member Technical Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: STPI has been announced for 01 posts such as Member Technical Staff for eligible B.Tech, M. Sc, M.Tech, Ph.D candidates with required trade certificate or experience, with the application window online open from 11.04.2026 to 25.05.2026 on stpi.in.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 48 years for Direct Recruitment, 56 years for Absorption/Deputation

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors/Masters/Ph.D in Engineering/Technology/Science with 12-17 years of experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the STPI Member Technical Staff- E-V, (Scientist ‘F’) Recruitment 2026.
